newCapabilities.name: Skill-Based Task Router [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Matches tasks to agents based on competency matrices, current workload, and historical success rates. Detects bottlenecks and re-routes in real-time.

newCapabilities.name: QCD Color Charge Simulator [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Lattice QCD Monte Carlo simulation for gluon exchange, asymptotic freedom verification, and hadron mass computation from first principles.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { QCDSim } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
const mass = QCDSim.lattice({ quarks: ['u', 'd'], beta: 6.0 });

newCapabilities.name: Context Persistence Layer [Passive]
newCapabilities.description: Maintains agent context across sessions with long-term memory, conversation threading, and knowledge graph integration for continuity.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { ContextLayer } from '@cmpsbl/agency';
ContextLayer.persist({ sessionId, context, ttl: '30d' });

newCapabilities.name: Attack Chain Reconstructor [Passive]
newCapabilities.description: Traces lateral movement paths, reconstructs full attack timelines, detects privilege escalation, and identifies credential abuse chains.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { AttackChain } from '@cmpsbl/cyber';
const timeline = AttackChain.reconstruct({ incidentId });

newCapabilities.name: Zero-Downtime Migrator [Hybrid]
newCapabilities.description: Observes data access patterns during migration, dual-writes to old and new schemas, and seamlessly cuts over when parity is confirmed.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { Migrator } from '@cmpsbl/runtime';
Migrator.dualWrite({ source: oldDb, target: newDb });

newCapabilities.name: Rate Limit Intelligence [Hybrid]
newCapabilities.description: Learns normal traffic patterns (passive) and dynamically adjusts rate limits per client/endpoint (active). Prevents abuse while preserving legitimate spikes.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { RateLimiter } from '@cmpsbl/runtime';
RateLimiter.adaptive({ learning: true });

newCapabilities.name: Particle Collision Analyzer [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Reconstructs collision events from detector data, clusters jets, identifies decay products, and computes invariant mass distributions.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { CollisionAnalyzer } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
const events = CollisionAnalyzer.reconstruct({ cms_energy: 13000 });

newCapabilities.name: Forensic Incident Response [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Automates incident containment, evidence preservation, forensic timeline reconstruction, and root cause analysis. Executes playbooks autonomously.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { ForensicIR } from '@cmpsbl/cyber';
ForensicIR.contain({ incidentId, preserveEvidence: true });

newCapabilities.name: Mission Decomposer [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Breaks complex user objectives into executable sub-tasks with dependency graphs, priority scoring, and deadline-aware scheduling. Handles re-planning on failure.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { MissionDecomposer } from '@cmpsbl/agency';
const plan = MissionDecomposer.plan({ objective, deadline });

newCapabilities.name: Content Generation Engine [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Structured content drafting with style adherence, audience targeting, format templating, and iterative revision loops.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { ContentGen } from '@cmpsbl/agency';
const draft = ContentGen.write({ brief, style: 'technical' });

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Synchronous-only architecture
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: No async patterns found in substantial codebase. May block the event loop under load.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: High cyclomatic complexity (335)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Complexity score of 335 indicates too many branching paths. Hard to test and maintain.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: 12 technical debt markers found
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 12 TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers indicate deferred work. ORACLE estimates this compounds into architectural risk within 12 months.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: High dependency coupling (107 imports)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 107 imports detected — high coupling increases blast radius of dependency failures.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Monolithic file (2202 lines)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 2202 lines in a single file. ENGINEER recommends decomposition to reduce cognitive load.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: No module exports detected
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Code appears self-contained with no exports. Limits reusability and testability.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: 26 classes in single file
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Multiple classes in one file suggest God Object patterns. ENGINEER recommends single-class files.

errorCodes.resolution: Automatic recovery via FAILSAFE. No action needed.
Verify operation is within policy bounds.

steps: Install the test harness: npm install @cmpsbl/test-harness
Place the restoration-report.json in your project root
Review output — each primitive's hardening is verified independently
Green = hardening active. Red = review the specific primitive section.
